---
title: "Source Data Description"
author: "S.C. McClelland"
date: "2026-02-24"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Overview of scenario and conv data

```{r headers}
# gridid     cell numbers
# crop       maiz (maize), soyb (soybean), swht (spring wheat), wwht (winter wheat)
# irr        0 (rainfed), 1 (irrigated)
# scenario   scenario compared to BAU
# ssp        historical
# gcm        historical
# rep        monte carlo iteration number
# d_s_SOC    SOC (soil carbon) response, Mg CO2-eq ha-1
#
# Positive responses = higher emissions
# Negative responses = mitigation or emissions reductions
# Note that wwht will not occur in any cover crop scenario
```
